scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names services,tests "pnpm start:all" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3010 http://127.0.0.1:8110/__control && APP_PORT=3010 TEST_PROXY_RECORDER_PORT=8110 playwright test"
scripts.test:e2e:ci: pnpm build && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names services,tests "pnpm start:all" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3010 http://127.0.0.1:8110/__control --timeout 120000 && APP_PORT=3010 TEST_PROXY_RECORDER_PORT=8110 RECORD_MODE=1 playwright test --workers 1 && APP_PORT=3010 TEST_PROXY_RECORDER_PORT=8110 playwright test"
